vision_and_purpose.description: Why the project exists, problem solved, intended outcome

goals_and_objectives.description: High-level goals, SMART objectives, and success criteria

requirements.description: Functional, non-functional, business, and technical requirements

resources.description: People, tools, budget, materials, and partners

timeline_and_milestones.description: Phases, milestones, deadlines, dependencies, and critical path

execution_plan.description: Assignments, workflows, tooling, automation, QA steps

quality_management.description: Quality criteria, testing strategy, review and acceptance

documentation.description: Requirements docs, architecture, notes, changelog, reports

delivery_and_deployment.description: Deployment plan, handover, training, launch checklist

evaluation_and_closure.description: Retrospective, lessons learned, budget reconciliation, archiving

failure_rollback_and_lessons_learned.description: Failure handling, rollback options, incident learning capture

risk_analysis.description: Likelihood, impact, mitigation owner, and status

strengths: Multi-agent swarm with clear role separation
weaknesses: Agent workflow artifacts are manual; no automated quality gate
Architecture docs historically bloated with stubs and generated files
No ruff D-code enforcement; docstrings are inconsistent
Pre-commit hook not enforced in all CI paths
opportunities: AI tooling improving rapidly — agents can be upgraded with new models
WCAG compliance creates accessible, production-ready UI for demos
Rust FFI bridge enables near-native performance at Python ergonomics
Community interest in multi-agent workflow tooling growing
threats: LLM API drift may break tool call contracts
Open-source forks may diverge without upstream sync policy

risk_register.risk: Agent branch mismatch causes commits on wrong branch
risk_register.mitigation: Pre-commit hook scripts/enforce_branch.py; branch gate in all agent definitions
Restructure docs/architecture and keep updates coupled to PRs

risk_register.risk: WCAG regressions introduced in future UI work
WebSocket reconnect loses messages during reconnect window
JWT secret left at default in production
risk_register.mitigation: Require PYAGENT_JWT_SECRET and enforce secret scanning
